instruction:
Let the population $\mathrm{X} \sim N (\mu, \sigma^{2})$, from which a sample of volume 16 is drawn, sample variance $S^{2}=0. 0 7$, so what is the confidence interval for the population variance of 0.95?

Options:
A. $$
( 0. 0 0 8, 0. 1 6 8 )
$$
B. $$
( 0. 0 3 8, 0. 1 1 8 )
$$
C. $$
( 0. 0 2 8, 0. 1 6 8 )
$$
D. $$
( 0. 0 3 8, 0. 1 0 8 )
$$
E. $$
( 0. 0 1 8, 0. 1 6 8 )
$$
F. $$
( 0. 0 3 8, 0. 1 6 8 )
$$
G. $$
( 0. 0 3 8, 0. 1 2 8 )
$$
H. $$
( 0. 0 3 8, 0. 1 5 8 )
$$
I. $$
( 0. 0 3 8, 0. 1 3 8 )
$$
J. $$
( 0. 0 3 8, 0. 1 4 8 )
$$
